eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LAW ENFORCEMENT WARNING for the following counties or areas: Quay, NM; at 11:06 AM on JUN 29, 2026 Effective until 11:06 AM JUN 30, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: All Clear at the Quay County Courthouse.  The courthouse will re-open at 1 PM. All Clear at the Quay County Courthouse.  The courthouse will re-open at 1 PM.
